_comment: RBA dashboard (tenant-validated 2026-06-25). Deploy via sdl_put_file to /dashboards/{{PREFIX}}-RBA. All panels read the risk index (dataSource.name='risk'). number(risk_score) cast for scores; sort before columns; simpledateformat for timestamps; stacked_bar transposes risk_object_type (single-token values, render-safe). An empty dashboard is the desired posture; rising scores indicate connected behaviour. After deploy, open in the UI and confirm panels render (render is a separate path from query validation).
description: Risk-Based Alerting: contributors publish low-noise risk events; risk accumulates per object; incident rules alert when accumulated risk crosses a threshold.

graphs.title: About Risk-Based Alerting (RBA)
graphs.markdown: Noisy-but-interesting observations are published as **risk events** into the `risk` index instead of alerting individually. Risk accumulates per **risk object** (user or host), amplified by **risk factors** (asset criticality, privileged, watchlist). A single high-fidelity alert fires only when a risk object crosses a 24h cumulative-score or 7d distinct-MITRE-tactic threshold.

graphs.title: Risk leaderboard (cumulative score per object)
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' risk_object=* | group risk_score=sum(number(risk_score)), tactics=estimate_distinct(mitre_tactic), techniques=estimate_distinct(mitre_technique), events=count(), last_seen=newest(timestamp) by risk_object, risk_object_type | sort -risk_score | columns risk_object, risk_object_type, risk_score, tactics, techniques, events, Last_Seen=simpledateformat(last_seen,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm','UTC') | limit 25

graphs.title: Risk events by MITRE tactic
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' mitre_tactic=* | group count=count() by mitre_tactic | sort -count | limit 10

graphs.title: Risk events by contributor
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' contributor=* | group count=count() by contributor | sort -count | limit 10

graphs.title: Risk score over time by object type
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' risk_object=* | group score=sum(number(risk_score)) by timestamp=timebucket('1h'), risk_object_type | transpose risk_object_type on timestamp

graphs.title: Top threat objects
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' threat_object=* | group count=count(), objects=estimate_distinct(risk_object) by threat_object, threat_object_type, mitre_technique | sort -count | limit 25

graphs.title: Contributing risk events (timeline)
graphs.query: dataSource.name='risk' risk_object=* | sort -timestamp | columns Event_Time=simpledateformat(timestamp,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss','UTC'), risk_object, risk_object_type, risk_score, mitre_tactic, mitre_technique, contributor, threat_object, risk_message | limit 200
